Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
from app import get_available_months, load_month_data
from collections import Counter

months = get_available_months\(\)
print\('Available months:', len\(months\), months[0], 'to', months[-1]\)

data = load_month_data\(2026, 1\)
print\('Jan 2026 scrobbles:', len\(data\)\)

counts = Counter\(\)
for s in data:
    key = s['artist'] + ' \\xe2\\x80\\x94 ' + s['album']
    counts[key] += 1
for label, count in counts.most_common\(5\):
    print\(count, label\)
")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
from app import get_available_years, load_month_data, get_available_months
from collections import Counter

years = get_available_years\(\)
print\('Years:', years\)

months = get_available_months\(\)
year_months = [m for y, m in months if y == 2025]
counts = Counter\(\)
for month in year_months:
    data = load_month_data\(2025, month\)
    if data:
        for s in data:
            key = s['artist'] + ' / ' + s['album']
            counts[key] += 1

print\('2025: total scrobbles across', len\(year_months\), 'months'\)
print\('Top 5:'\)
for label, count in counts.most_common\(5\):
    print\(count, label[:60]\)
")

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "
from app import aggregate_albums, get_available_months

all_albums = aggregate_albums\(\)
since_2013 = aggregate_albums\(from_year=2013\)

print\('All time - total albums:', len\(all_albums\)\)
print\('All time - top 3:'\)
for a in all_albums[:3]: print\(' ', a['count'], a['label'][:50]\)

print\('Since 2013 - total albums:', len\(since_2013\)\)
print\('Same result?', len\(all_albums\) == len\(since_2013\)\)
print\('Earliest year in data:', min\(y for y,m in get_available_months\(\)\)\)
")
